creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
well it fixed it for me

there's also https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280885 here

so total 3 pr's filed for same exact issue, i didn't file one because i went to look for it first

just bumping portrev would be extra build but it would cause less pr traffic and maintainer being mailed

otherwise we beed other fix

but things that affect each other aren't that uncommon and it's not that rare to find portrevs being bumped as they need to be updated together

i'm also fine with any other better solutions should anybody have better idea
